title: Gyufise 42Pcs Red Glitter Star Cupcake Toppers Mixed Size Twinkle Little Star Cupcake Picks Decorations for Wedding Anniversary Baby Shower Birthday Party Supplies
features: ❤Package included: 42Pcs Star Cupcake Toppers(14Pcs Per Size, 3 Sizes Total). Comes with assembled, so you can insert into your cake directly, which make your cake more interesting.

❤Premium Material: These Star Cupcake Toppers are made of high quality 300 gram glitter card stock and food-grade toothpick, very safe to put them on cakes, cupcakes, ice cream, fruits, pie, dessert, cheese or any dish and food appetizer you want to decorate.

❤These Star Cupcake Toppers are so cute and good for wedding engagement party, bridal shower party, baby shower party, boys girls kids birthday party cupcake decorations. They can make your cupcake more attractive and bring the fun to your party. You can also apply them for ice cream, fruits, cookies and other desserts.
❤Widely Application: Unique personalized propose star theme design. Best party cake decor which can be used at babyshower theme Party Decorations, and other similar theme parties.
❤Tips: Designed for single-sided, the backside is plain white. Only for decoration purposes, this is not edible and please do NOT use it in oven or microwave.
description: Features - Package: Pack of 42Pcs. Size: 1.8 *5.1 inch / 1.4*5.1 inch / 1.2*5.1 inch(Include Stick). Comes with assembled, so you can insert into your cake directly, which make your cake more interesting. - Material: Made of paper material, solid, not easy to deform and fade and can reuse for many times; Please don't put them into oven for they are only decorative and not edible. - If you want to return the item, please kindly contact us first, then we will deal with it until you are satisfied. Note 1. Due to the light and screen setting difference, the color of the product may differ slightly from the picture. 2. Please allow the tiny measuring deviation due to manual measurement. 3. Thanks for your understanding and enjoy your shopping moment!
